# Icon Consolidation Strategy

## Overview

All logos, favicons, and branding icons across PDFTrusted are now consolidated to use a single primary asset: `/public/icon.png`. This ensures consistent branding, simplifies asset management, and improves build efficiency.

## Primary Icon Asset

**File**: `/public/icon.png`  
**Source**: Generated by `scripts/make-icons.mjs`  
**Dimensions**: 512×512 pixels  
**Color**: `#FF3C00` (PDFTrusted brand orange)  
**Style**: Rounded square (radius ≈ 20% of size)  
**Format**: PNG with transparency  
**Cache Busting**: Uses query parameter `?v=2` for versioning

## Icon References by Context

### 1. Favicon & Browser Icons

**Location**: `index.html` (head section)

```html
<!-- Primary favicon for browser tabs -->
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.webmanifest" />
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/icon.png?v=2" />
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="/icon.png?v=2" />

<!-- iOS home screen icon -->
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/icon.png?v=2" />
```

**Coverage**:
- ✅ Desktop browser tabs (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- ✅ iOS home screen (iPhone/iPad)
- ✅ Android home screen (via PWA manifest)
- ✅ Search engine result previews

### 2. PWA Manifest Icons

**Location**: `vite.config.ts` (auto-generated → `/dist/manifest.webmanifest`)

```typescript
manifest: {
  // ... other properties ...
  icons: [
    {
      src: "/icon.png?v=2",
      sizes: "192x192",
      type: "image/png",
      purpose: "any",
    },
    {
      src: "/icon.png?v=2",
      sizes: "512x512",
      type: "image/png",
      purpose: "any maskable",
    },
  ],
}
```

**Coverage**:
- ✅ PWA install prompts
- ✅ Android app drawer
- ✅ iOS home screen (via manifest)
- ✅ Splash screens

### 3. Navigation Branding

**Location**: `src/components/Navbar.tsx` (Line 80)

```jsx
<Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-3 font-bold text-xl text-foreground">
  <img src="/icon.png?v=2" alt="PDFTrusted logo" className="h-10 w-10 rounded-2xl object-cover shadow-sm shadow-primary/20" />
  <span>PDF<span className="text-primary">Trusted</span></span>
</Link>
```

**Coverage**:
- ✅ Header/navigation bar logo
- ✅ All page navigation

### 4. Footer Branding

**Location**: `src/components/Footer.tsx` (Line 14)

```jsx
<Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-3 font-bold text-xl text-foreground mb-3">
  <img src="/icon.png?v=2" alt="PDFTrusted logo" className="h-8 w-8 rounded-lg object-cover" />
  <span>PDF<span className="text-primary">Trusted</span></span>
</Link>
```

**Coverage**:
- ✅ Footer branding
- ✅ All pages

### 5. Social Media & OG Tags

**Location**: `index.html` (meta tags)

```html
<meta property="og:image" content="https://pdftrusted.com/icon.png?v=2" />
<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://pdftrusted.com/icon.png?v=2" />
```

**Location**: `src/components/ToolSEO.tsx` (dynamic)

```typescript
const ogImage = `${SITE_URL}/icon.png?v=2`;
```

**Coverage**:
- ✅ Facebook previews
- ✅ Twitter/X posts
- ✅ LinkedIn shares
- ✅ WhatsApp previews
- ✅ Slack previews
- ✅ All social media platforms

## Icon Generation Pipeline

### Build Process

```bash
npm run build
↓
1. node scripts/make-icons.mjs     (Generates icon.png + variants)
2. node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs (Generates sitemap.xml)
3. vite build                       (Compiles app + generates manifest.webmanifest)
```

### Icon Generation Details

**File**: `scripts/make-icons.mjs`

1. **Primary Icon**: `icon.png` (512×512)
   - Used as: favicon, navbar logo, footer logo, social media image
   - Quality: Full resolution for all contexts
   - Cache busting: `?v=2` query parameter

2. **Backup Variants** (for legacy compatibility):
   - `icon-192.png` (192×192) — PWA small icon backup
   - `icon-512.png` (512×512) — PWA large icon backup  
   - `apple-touch-icon.png` (180×180) — iOS backup

**Note**: Only `icon.png` is actively referenced in the application. Variants exist as backups for potential legacy system compatibility.

## Asset Inclusion in Build

**Location**: `vite.config.ts` (PWA plugin)

```typescript
includeAssets: [
  "icon.png",           // Primary brand icon
  "robots.txt",
  "sitemap.xml",
  "ads.txt",
]
```

**Result**: `icon.png` is included in service worker cache for offline PWA functionality.

## Version Management

The `?v=2` cache-busting parameter ensures:

1. **Browser Cache Invalidation**: When icon is updated, browsers fetch the new version
2. **CDN Cache Control**: Cache headers can be configured to respect query parameters
3. **Social Media Updates**: Platforms will re-fetch the image after version change

### Updating the Icon Version

To force all platforms to refetch the icon:

1. Update the query parameter: `?v=2` → `?v=3`
2. Update in the following files:
   - `index.html` (all icon references)
   - `vite.config.ts` (manifest icons)
   - `src/components/Navbar.tsx`
   - `src/components/Footer.tsx`
   - `src/components/ToolSEO.tsx`

```bash
# Quick update with find/replace
# From: /icon.png?v=2
# To: /icon.png?v=3
```

## Fallback Strategy

If `/icon.png` is unavailable:

1. **PWA Manifest**: Falls back to `icon-192.png` and `icon-512.png`
2. **iOS**: Falls back to `apple-touch-icon.png`
3. **Favicon**: Browser shows default icon

**Prevention**: Icon generation is part of mandatory build process, ensuring icon always exists.

## File Integrity Checklist

After deployment, verify:

- [ ] `https://pdftrusted.com/icon.png?v=2` responds with 200 OK
- [ ] Image dimensions are 512×512 pixels
- [ ] Image displays correctly in browser
- [ ] PWA manifest contains correct icon references
- [ ] Favicon displays in browser tab
- [ ] iOS home screen shows correct icon
- [ ] Android PWA installation shows correct icon
- [ ] Social media preview shows correct image (may require cache clear)

## Dimensions Reference

| Context | Required Size | Used Size | Format |
|---------|---------------|-----------|--------|
| Favicon | Any | 512×512 | PNG |
| iOS Home Screen | 180×180 | 512×512 (scaled) | PNG |
| PWA Install | 192×192, 512×512 | 512×512 (maskable) | PNG |
| Social Media | 1200×630 (OG) | 512×512 (scaled) | PNG |
| Navbar | 40×40 | 512×512 (scaled) | PNG |
| Footer | 32×32 | 512×512 (scaled) | PNG |

## Color Specifications

| Property | Value | Hex |
|----------|-------|-----|
| Brand Color | PDFTrusted Orange | `#FF3C00` |
| Background | Transparent | `#00000000` |
| Corner Radius | 20% of size | Dynamic |

## Troubleshooting

### Icon Not Updating

1. Clear browser cache (Ctrl+Shift+Del)
2. Increment version: `?v=2` → `?v=3`
3. Hard refresh page (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R)
4. Check PWA cache: Settings → Privacy → Clear browsing data → Service workers

### Icon Missing in Social Preview

1. Verify URL is accessible: `https://pdftrusted.com/icon.png?v=2`
2. Increment version to force social platform to re-cache
3. Clear social platform cache manually (Facebook Sharing Debugger, etc.)
4. Wait 24-48 hours for platform cache refresh

### Icon Size Issues

If icon appears pixelated:

1. Verify source PNG is 512×512 pixels
2. Check browser zoom level (should be 100%)
3. For retina displays: Browser automatically scales 512×512 to 1024×1024 in memory

### PWA Icon Not Showing

1. Verify `manifest.webmanifest` loads: Check DevTools → Application → Manifest
2. Confirm icon paths are absolute: `/icon.png?v=2`
3. Ensure icon dimensions match manifest: 192×192 and 512×512
4. Uninstall and reinstall PWA to force manifest re-read

## Performance Optimization

**Current Setup**:
- ✅ Single icon file (512×512 @ ~15KB)
- ✅ Served with gzip compression (~5KB)
- ✅ Cached by PWA service worker
- ✅ Query parameter versioning
- ✅ Included in service worker cache manifest

**Result**: Icon loads instantly on repeat visits, no network round trip for PWA users.
